- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
Summary: Created and verified this file in .github.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
Summary: Confirmed request is a new React app using Vite in the current workspace.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
Summary: Ran Vite scaffolding in current directory with React template.

- [x] Customize the Project
Summary: Skipped customization because the request is a base scaffold.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
Summary: No required extensions were specified by setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
Summary: Installed dependencies and verified production build succeeds.

- [x] Create and Run Task
Summary: Created and launched a background VS Code task for npm run dev.

- [x] Launch the Project
Summary: Dev server launched successfully through task at localhost:5173.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
Summary: Verified README.md exists and this instructions file reflects current setup.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
